display_information.name: Growth Beacon
display_information.description: Detects buying intent, expansion signals, competitor mentions, and churn risk in Slack — turns them into CRM-ready business intelligence.

assistant_view.assistant_description: I monitor Slack conversations for buying intent, expansion opportunities, churn risk, and other growth signals, and turn them into CRM-ready business intelligence.

suggested_prompts.title: How do I scan for signals?
suggested_prompts.message: How do I scan a channel for growth signals?

suggested_prompts.title: Show recent signals
suggested_prompts.message: What growth signals have been detected recently?

slash_commands.description: Scan this channel for recent growth signals
